ops.title: GAP-1: daemon lifecycle friction audit (launchctl/pluginkit cluster)
ops.description: Completeness critic: the highest-frequency system-tool cluster in the corpus command tally — launchctl (278 invocations) + pluginkit (28) — has no dedicated catalog theme; daemon lifecycle friction is fragmented across PLF-03/05/07. Run a focused mining + verify pass on daemon start/stop/kickstart/bootstrap churn (cc-notes.contentd, synckit, cc-pool, claude-thinking-patch agents) and decide what automation (if any) consolidates it.

ops.text: themed catalog entry with evidence cites for the launchctl/pluginkit cluster
fix shipped or explicit no-automation decision recorded
